case_title: WINTHROP, WARREN VS BEARDSLEY, GENEVA MRS.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEARDSLEY, GENEVA MRS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINTHROP, WARREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEARDSLEY, GENEVA MRS. $438.50 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $498.50, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE 877.00; AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO DEFENDANT MRS. GENEVA BEARDSLEY-NOT DELIVEABLE AS ADDRESS. (NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BEARDSLEY, GENEVA MRS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $982.00 FILED BY WINTHROP, WARREN AS TO DEFENDANT BEARDSLEY, GENEVA MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
